Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}And that figure... It doesn't seem like it wants to attack us, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Anyway, concentrate on those Shadows for now![n]{f 1 1}
